evidence: charm_wall_breakaway_long contributes $985.6 from only 5 VALID_0DTE trades, with $197.1 average PnL, 234.36 PnL/exposure hour, median MFE 146.2, no slow >=12h trades, but 50.5 minute average hold and -346.8 worst MAE. Prior admission geometry improved score, so this test keeps admission mostly intact and tunes realization only.
name: Charm Wall Realization Efficiency Trim
risk: The profile may require the 12-point expanded target to monetize rare convex wall-breakaway moves; compressing target geometry can reduce total PnL more than it improves exposure efficiency.
trigger: VALID_0DTE charm-wall breakaway with require-breakout true, bounded distance above charm wall, and ES support already admitted by current geometry.
validation_metric: Profile PnL/exposure remains >=225, total net profit remains >=98% of run_029, completed trades remain within 10%, global worst MAE does not worsen beyond -513.4, and slow_12h remains 0.

evidence: The analyzer repeatedly identifies charm-pin MAE as path-dependent: the worst charm-pin trade reached first meaningful profit only after about 80 minutes, while protected extended-VWAP winners resolve quickly. Static global filters overlap protected winners, so this remains a code-level edge rather than a safe config-only change.
name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
risk: Can overfit a small set of delayed recoveries or block profitable high-extension charm-pin winners unless validated against protected fast and extended-VWAP winner retention.
trigger: charm_pin_pullback_long high-extension or recent-high-rejection entries that fail to print early positive progress after entry.
validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE from -513.4 toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL, >=95% protected fast extended-VWAP winners, total net profit >=98% of leader, and slow_12h remains 0.
